cases.prompt: The default skill body that forge scaffolds is wordier than it needs to be. Propose a tighter version in the scaffolder, keeping every emitted plugin otherwise identical.
cases.note: canonical Tier-A trigger: a behavior-preserving quality refinement to scaffold.ts's generated body

cases.prompt: Refine how the forge engine serializes agent frontmatter — the emit logic in the scaffolder could be cleaner. Don't change what it produces.
cases.note: another Tier-A refinement of HOW forge emits, behavior-preserving

cases.prompt: Add a brand-new component primitive to the forge spec and engine so it can scaffold a new kind of file.
cases.note: Tier B — a new spec field/primitive is human-authored; forge-improver must NOT grab it despite being forge-related

cases.prompt: Summarize what the ObjectCore repository does for a new contributor.
cases.note: a plain question — nothing should delegate to forge-improver
